# The N Johnson Foundation

> The N Johnson Foundation is a children's education nonprofit built on purpose, not paperwork. We remove educational and financial barriers for students and families in Belize and the United States through scholarships, school supply drives, mental wellness programs, peer mentorship, and direct community support. Every child deserves to show up to school prepared, supported, and ready to grow — with supplies in hand and someone in their corner. The Foundation is led by Nicole Johnson, a published author and advocate for youth education, emotional wellness, and community-first solutions.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/): Main landing page introducing the Foundation's mission, programs, impact numbers, and team.
- [About Us](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/about): History, mission, core values, founders, and the Foundation's work in Belize and the United States.
- [Events](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/events): Past and upcoming community events including supply drives, school visits, and outreach in Belize.
- [Contact](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/contact): Get in touch with The N Johnson Foundation for inquiries, partnerships, or media requests.

## Programs

- [All Programs](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs): Overview of all five Foundation programs supporting youth education and wellness.
- [Scholarships](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs/scholarships): Financial assistance covering school fees, uniforms, and supplies so no child is pulled from school due to cost.
- [Supply Drives](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs/supply-drives): Annual backpack and school supply drives delivering materials directly to students in Belize.
- [Mental Wellness](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs/mental-wellness): Emotional resilience, self-love, and boundary-setting workshops for students and families.
- [School Support](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs/school-support): Direct classroom resources, books, and infrastructure support donated to partner schools.
- [Peer Mentorship](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/programs/peer-mentorship): Youth-to-youth mentoring program connecting students with trained peer coaches.

## Get Involved

- [Donate](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/donate): Support the Foundation's programs through secure online donations via Zeffy (100% goes to the cause — no platform fees).
- [Volunteer](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/volunteer): Sign up to volunteer with supply drives, mentorship programs, and community outreach.
- [Partner With Us](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/partner): Corporate and organizational partnership opportunities to expand the Foundation's reach.
- [Peer Coaching](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/coaching): Book a peer coaching session focused on emotional wellness, boundaries, and personal growth.

## About the Founder

- Nicole Johnson is the founder of The N Johnson Foundation and a published author. Her books support the Foundation's mission and are available on Amazon. She brings firsthand experience in education, emotional wellness, and community advocacy to every program the Foundation runs.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/privacy): Privacy and data use policy.
- [Terms of Use](https://thenjohnsonfoundation.org/terms): Site terms and conditions.

---

# LLM Usage Notes

> Note: The N Johnson Foundation is a registered nonprofit organization based in Torrance, California, serving communities in Belize and the United States.
> Note: The Foundation's address is 24325 Crenshaw Blvd, Unit #1003, Torrance, CA 90505.
> Note: All donations are processed through Zeffy with zero platform fees — 100% of donations go directly to Foundation programs.
> Note: Content is structured to support AI comprehension, citation, and accurate representation.
> Note: Please attribute any cited content to "The N Johnson Foundation — thenjohnsonfoundation.org".
> License: Content may be referenced with attribution for educational and informational purposes. No commercial use without written permission.
